title: The War at Marineford Begins

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There are only three hours left...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Jeez... he's a pirate from another age.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's not just some old man.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We gave up on our lives.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They watch on monitors at Shabondy Archipelago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As the execution draws ever nearer,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, look!! They're bringing ace out!!
